channel.title: Haskell on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in Haskell on Memo

item.title: Install Haskell
item.description: Install Haskell # This is a guide to installing Haskell using Stack. Install Stack # Stack is a tool for managing haskell projects, installing compilers and packages, and building projects. The installation is done as follows. Arch sudo pacman -S stack Ubuntu curl -sSL https://get.haskellstack.org/ | sh stack upgrade Basic Usage # To create a new project, run stack new. stack new hs-proj When you create a new project, the following directory structure will be created, and you can write the main code in Main.
